scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:electron: cd apps/desktop && wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run dev
scripts.build:backend: cd apps/backend && pip install pyinstaller && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean rabbit-hole-backend.spec
scripts.package: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && cd apps/desktop && npm run dist
